diagnosis: Brier-first frozen selection found a low-recall safety model; a future protocol must optimize safety utility explicitly before any new run.
official_recommendation: Open only a future D020 recall-first safety freeze discussion or move to manuscript discussion; do not execute a new experiment under D019-C.
claim_boundary: Future-only discussion; no implementation, fitting, threshold change, calibration, final-test, hardware/GPU, mission-loop, Gate 5 reinterpretation, QML invention, quantum advantage, or Gate 6.
